title: 5 Investors Betting Big on Fastenal (FAST) Stock

title: Fastenal Is At A Critical Turning Point

title: Fastenal credits industrial capital goods demand for consensus beating earnings
text: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) has reported first-quarter earnings that beat expectations as it benefited from strong underlying demand in markets tied to industrial capital goods and commodities. The Winona, Minnesota-based wholesale distributor of industrial and construction supplies said this more than offset a modest contraction for construction supplies during the three months ended March 31, 2022.
